title: alegouellec/BIOMARCOVID: BIOMARCOVID Protocol v1.0
author: audrey LE GOUELLEC

description: Predictive biomarker discovery for COVID-19 severity using multiplatform untargeted LC-MS/MS metabolomics, 62 routine blood tests, and clinical data in hospitalized patients (CHUGA, 2020). Multi-block chemometric analysis — BIOMARCOVID protocol.
